//: Why this file deviates from the plan's minimal config: under pnpm workspaces neither 'hono' nor '@supabase/supabase-js' is hoisted to the repo-root node_modules (they live under services/api/node_modules), so tsc -p tests/tsconfig.json cannot resolve those imports without explicit path entries. Overriding baseRef to '..' is what then forces the @jpx-accounting/* paths to be restated (TypeScript resolves the inherited paths relative to *this* file's baseUrl). Known fragility: @supabase/supabase-js has divergent version ranges across workspaces; tests typecheck against services/api's copy. Pin via pnpm.overrides if drift starts mattering.
